HRREC-91999.summary: PH: Recruiter sees blue "unread marker" removed after clicking in the view a message in full
HRREC-91999.description_excerpt: As a recruiter I want unread markers to clear after I fully view a message so my list reflects what I processed. Scenarios: full view clears unread; partial peek does not clear; concurrent recruiters refresh reflects per-user or shared read model per decision. DoR table and Notes link Figma/PRD for 2-way email MVP.

kb.q: [Net-new gap review HRREC-82977 / INDIA-E2E-006] Story HRREC-91999: PH: Recruiter sees blue "unread marker" removed after clicking in the view a message in full. unread marker read state transcript list two-way email recruiter
kb.hits_summary: Conversational messaging docs contrast XO vs REST capabilities and mention unread/delivered/read tracking gaps on some surfaces; a recruiting TDD note discusses recruiting vs candidate email concurrency. Tangential hits include Planning’s blue unread affordance.

kb.q: [Net-new gap review HRREC-82977 / INDIA-E2E-006] Story HRREC-91999: PH: Recruiter sees blue "unread marker" removed after clicking in the view a message in full. full view vs peek concurrent recruiters per-user read model shared read
kb.hits_summary: Mostly generic (DevSite empty-state, OfficeConnect per-user installs). Limited direct precedent for recruiter thread unread semantics beyond unrelated UX articles.

HRREC-92001.summary: PH: Recruiter sees the panel expand & views full message when clicking the grow button or clicking a single message
HRREC-92001.description_excerpt: Recruiter wants sliding side panel to expand to wide reading layout on Grow or opening a single message; modal/drop shadow on standard screens; on XL, expanded panel overlays instead of over-pushing content; shrink restores narrow width and removes scrim. DoR table; Notes link Figma/PRD.
